description: This email template is perfect for those who want to share the most popular articles of the year with their audience. Whether you're a business professional, a creative individual, or a news magazine editor, this template is designed to showcase a variety of articles in a simple and elegant manner. With its clean layout and easy-to-read format, it's an excellent way to highlight the top news stories or business trends. The template is also versatile enough to adapt to a year-in-review format, making it a great option for end-of-the-year roundups or recap emails. Enjoy sharing captivating content with this versatile email template.
short_description: Stay ahead with your content with this simple yet engaging email template, perfect for magazines or news agencies. Highlight your top business and creative articles of the year, encourage deeper reader engagement, and keep your audience informed. Ideal for a year in review or regular updates.

designer.description: Hi! My name is Martin. I’m a web / user interface designer located in Bulgaria, Europe. Since the past 10 years I’ve worked on a variety of projects for small, medium and large companies. I enjoy doing pixel perfect designs with attention to every detail.
